list.title: Agents
list.emptyDescription: Create your first AI agent to get started.
list.confirmDelete: Delete this agent? This cannot be undone.

detail.title: Agent Detail
detail.deleteConfirm: Delete this agent? This cannot be undone.
detail.conflictAlert: Someone else modified this agent. Reload to see changes.
detail.openOrchestrationHelp: Wake-up triggers and the failed-event queue for this agent.

toolsOverview.createHint: Save this agent first to configure its tools.

form.name: Name
form.modelIdHelp: Optional override. Leave empty to use provider default.
form.modelIdPlaceholder: Default (leave empty) or e.g. claude-sonnet-4-6, gpt-4o-mini
form.noKeyGroups: This project has no key groups yet. Create one in the Keys section before adding an agent.
form.systemPromptPlaceholder: Enter the system prompt for this agent...
form.promptStrategyLazyHelp: Sends prompt only on first turn.
form.contextTokenCapHelp: Maximum context window tokens in compact mode.
form.a2aHelp: Allow this agent to communicate with other agents in the same chatroom.
form.wakeupHelp: Configure when this agent wakes up in a chatroom conversation.
form.wakeupInertWarning: No trigger is enabled, so this agent will not respond to messages on its own. It can still be summoned with {'@'}mention in a chatroom. Enable a trigger below to let it reply automatically.

ragList.title: RAG Configurations
ragList.deleteConfirm: Delete "{name}"? Agents using it will lose retrieval, and its indexed documents are removed. This cannot be undone.
ragList.noEmbedKeys: Add an embedding API key first.
ragList.emptyDescription: Create a RAG config to give your agents a knowledge base.

ragForm.name: Name
ragForm.noRerankKeys: No Cohere (rerank) key in this project -- carry one in the Keys section to enable reranking.
ragForm.immutableHint: Embedding provider, model, and chunk strategy are fixed at creation and cannot be changed.

graphragList.title: GraphRAG Configurations
graphragList.created: GraphRAG configuration created. Bind it on the agent and run a build.
graphragList.deleteConfirm: Delete the GraphRAG configuration for "{name}"? Its knowledge graph and entity vectors are removed. This cannot be undone.
graphragList.noAgents: This project has no agents yet. Create an agent before configuring GraphRAG.
graphragList.noKeyGroups: This project has no key groups yet. Create one in the Keys section first.
graphragList.allConfigured: Every agent already has a GraphRAG configuration.
graphragList.builderHint: The builder key group extracts entities and relations; it must differ from the agent's own key group (billing separation).
graphragList.unboundHint: This config is built but the agent does not use it yet. Open the agent and set its GraphRAG configuration to activate retrieval.
graphragList.emptyDescription: Create a GraphRAG config to build a knowledge graph from agent conversations.

graphragGraph.title: Knowledge Graph
graphragGraph.truncated: This graph is large and has been truncated to the most connected entities. Some nodes and relations are not shown.
graphragGraph.loadFailed: Failed to load the knowledge graph.
graphragGraph.emptyDescription: Run a build for this configuration to populate its knowledge graph.
graphragGraph.legendHint: Larger nodes have more relations. Drag to rearrange, scroll to zoom.

graphragForm.builderKeyGroupSameError: Builder key group must differ from the agent's key group.
graphragForm.triggerHelp: When to automatically rebuild the knowledge graph.

builtinTools.title: Built-in Tools
builtinTools.subtitle: Capabilities this agent can use. Code Interpreter runs arbitrary code, so it is off by default -- enable it when you want the agent to compute, analyse data, or make charts.
builtinTools.code_execDesc: Run Python in a gVisor sandbox. State persists across the chat -- loaded data and saved charts carry over between messages (30s per call).
builtinTools.web_searchDesc: Let the agent search the web via the project's configured search provider.
builtinTools.fileDesc: Let the agent read and write files in its persistent workspace.

hosted.title: Hosted Tools
hosted.subtitle: Capabilities SMAP manages for this agent.

local.title: Local Tools
local.subtitle: User-defined actions this agent can perform.

webSearch.label: Web Search
webSearch.description: Let the agent search the web via the project's configured search provider.

codeInterpreter.label: Code Interpreter
codeInterpreter.description: Run Python in a gVisor sandbox. State persists across the chat (30s per call).

files.title: Files
files.hint: These files are available to this agent's Code Interpreter and File Workspace tools at agent-files/<path>.
files.deleteConfirm: Delete "{path}"? The file will no longer be available in the Code Interpreter workspace.
files.sizeHint: Up to 32 MB per file, 256 MB total per agent.

fileWorkspace.label: File Workspace
fileWorkspace.description: Let the agent read and write files in its persistent workspace.

fileSearch.label: File Search
fileSearch.description: Search files uploaded for this agent and return relevant passages.
fileSearch.needsKnowledge: Attach a knowledge source (RAG config) to enable File Search.

mcp.label: MCP Servers
mcp.description: External tool servers running in the gVisor sandbox.
mcp.deleteConfirm: Remove the MCP server "{ref}"? The agent will lose its tools.

referenceHelp.url: SSE or HTTP endpoint URL for the MCP server
referenceHelp.package: npx or uvx package specifier, e.g. {'@'}modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem

mcp.allowedToolsHelp: List the tool names this agent may call (comma or space separated). At least one is required.
mcp.allowedToolsRequired: List at least one tool name.
mcp.emptyDescription: Add an MCP server to give this agent access to external tools.

functions.label: Functions
functions.description: Outbound HTTP calls this agent can make via the egress proxy.
functions.deleteConfirm: Remove the function "{name}"? The agent will lose this capability.
functions.name: Function Name
functions.urlHelp: Must be HTTPS. The host must be on the project egress allowlist.
functions.headersHelp: Non-secret headers added to every request. Use Auth for credentials.
functions.authTokenRequired: Enter a token, or choose Keep existing credentials.
functions.authHeaderRequired: Enter both a header name and value.
functions.invalidParamsSchema: Parameters must be a JSON object schema ("type": "object").
functions.emptyDescription: Add a function to let this agent call external APIs via the egress proxy.

localShell.label: Local Shell
localShell.description: Run shell commands in a gVisor sandbox.
localShell.comingSoon: Local Shell runs shell commands in a sandbox. This capability is coming soon.

mcp.title: MCP Bindings
mcp.subtitle: Tools available to {name}. URL/package servers run in the gVisor sandbox and may only reach hosts on the project's egress allowlist --
mcp.infoAlert: MCP bindings let this agent call external tool servers. Egress must be allowlisted at project level.
mcp.deleteConfirm: Remove the MCP binding for "{ref}"? The agent will lose its tools.
mcp.empty: No MCP servers bound to this agent.

referenceHelp.builtin: Enter built-in name: file, web_search, or code_exec
referenceHelp.url: SSE or HTTP endpoint URL for the MCP server
referenceHelp.package: npx or uvx package specifier, e.g. {'@'}modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem

mcp.allowedToolsHint: Comma- or space-separated tool names to expose to the agent. Leave empty to expose none until you test and pick.
mcp.allowedToolsHelp: Leave empty to allow all discovered tools. Enter specific tool names to restrict access.
mcp.emptyDescription: Add an MCP server to give this agent access to external tools.

egress.title: MCP Egress Allowlist
egress.subtitle: Hostnames MCP sandboxes in this project may connect to. Owner only. Everything else is blocked by the egress proxy.
egress.infoAlert: Only MCP server connections to hostnames in this list are permitted. All other egress is blocked. Only project owners can manage this list.
egress.hostnameInvalid: Hostname must follow RFC 1123 format (e.g. api.example.com).
egress.duplicateError: This hostname is already in the allowlist.
egress.ownerOnly: Only project owners can modify the egress allowlist.
egress.removeConfirm: Remove "{host}" from the egress allowlist? MCP sandboxes will no longer reach it.
egress.empty: No hostnames allowlisted -- MCP sandboxes have no outbound egress.
egress.emptyDescription: Add hostnames that MCP servers in this project are allowed to connect to. Without entries, all MCP egress is blocked.

rag.title: RAG Documents
rag.subtitle: Upload source documents to index for retrieval. Files over 32 MB upload resumably and index in the background.
rag.sizeHint: PDF, TXT, MD, DOCX -- up to 32 MB
rag.deleteConfirm: Delete "{name}"? This removes its indexed chunks and cannot be undone.
rag.ownerRequired: Only project owners can upload documents.
rag.emptyDescription: Upload documents to build a knowledge base for retrieval.
rag.visibleToAgentsHint: Only the selected agents can retrieve this document. An empty selection means no agent can see it.
rag.noBoundAgents: No agents are bound to this config yet. Bind an agent to its knowledge base first, then choose document visibility here.
